step_rationale: Endothelial regeneration and vascular restoration post-MI.
mechanism: ANGPTL6 promotes endothelial repair and stent endothelialization to restore coronary integrity.

references.title: Differential Proteomic Profiles of Coronary Serum Exosomes in Acute Myocardial Infarction Patients with or Without Diabetes Mellitus: ANGPTL6 Accelerates Regeneration of Endothelial Cells Treated with Rapamycin via MAPK Pathways.
